LanguageData.MaterialFilter_SettingsHideButtonUseless: Hide where it can't do anything

Material filtering only affects apparel and weapons. Hide the Filter button on storage that can never hold either - bookcases, graves, food and feedstock containers, shell racks, gene banks, and the same kinds of modded storage. Weapon racks, apparel lockers, and general storage keep the button. On by default.
LanguageData.MaterialFilter_SettingsExtraExcludedLabe: Also hide on these storage defNames (one per line, exact and case-sensitive):
